overview.introduction: Track Docker container resource usage using cAdvisor metrics collector.
overview.why_it_matters: Understanding Monitoring Docker allows SRE and DevOps engineers to detect issues before outages occur.
overview.industry_usage: Used by site reliability engineers and platform teams globally.
overview.what_you_will_build: An isolated monitoring sandbox workspace configuring Prometheus, Alertmanager, and Grafana.
overview.prerequisites: Linux terminal fundamentals and basic networking knowledge.
learning_outcomes: Explain the main concepts of Monitoring Docker.
Configure Prometheus scrape targets and PromQL expressions.
Set up Alertmanager notification routing and silences.
Design Grafana dashboards and visualization panels.
Build end-to-end monitoring solutions for Docker and Kubernetes.

key_concepts.title: Container Resource Metrics
key_concepts.definition: Collecting container CPU, memory, network I/O, and disk usage metrics via cAdvisor.
why_important: Provides real-time visibility into application and infrastructure health.
Enables proactive alert notifications before service degradation.
Accelerates incident triage and root cause analysis.
key_concepts.explanation: Detailed context regarding Monitoring Docker. Monitoring metrics and configuring alert rules ensures production reliability.

commands.name: curl
commands.purpose: Execute actions related to Monitoring Docker.
commands.output_explanation: Confirms action step for Monitoring Docker is processed.

key_concepts.pro_tip: Validate rules syntax using promtool check rules before deploying rule files into production.
key_concepts.best_practices: Use recording rules for expensive queries and keep alert rules actionable.
key_concepts.common_mistakes: Creating noisy alert rules without clear threshold boundaries causing alert fatigue.
key_concepts.real_world_usage: SRE teams build Grafana dashboards displaying latency, traffic, errors, and saturation (The Four Golden Signals).
key_concepts.summary: Monitoring Docker forms a core foundation of modern cloud observability.

interactive_examples.scenario: Review local variables settings in workspace.

steps.explanation: Ensure you are in the correct home directory.

interactive_examples.solution: Verify tasks lists details and paths.

lessons.title: 1. Verify cAdvisor metrics endpoint availability
lessons.definition: Collecting container CPU, memory, network I/O, and disk usage metrics via cAdvisor.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Verify cAdvisor metrics endpoint availability is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Fetch container metrics exposed by cAdvisor on port 8080.
lessons.hint: Check spelling and spacings of your commands carefully.

lessons.title: 2. Display system diagnostics
lessons.definition: Collecting container CPU, memory, network I/O, and disk usage metrics via cAdvisor.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Display system diagnostics is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.hint: Confirm you are in the workspace folder.

lessons.title: 3. List directory contents
lessons.definition: Collecting container CPU, memory, network I/O, and disk usage metrics via cAdvisor.
lessons.explanation: Understanding List directory contents is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Confirm created hosts, templates, or playbooks configurations.
lessons.hint: Run files list to verify existence.

lessons.title: 4. Verify file content displays
lessons.definition: Collecting container CPU, memory, network I/O, and disk usage metrics via cAdvisor.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Verify file content displays is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Check the configured prometheus.yml file content details.
lessons.example: cat prometheus.yml || cat alertmanager.yml || cat rules.yml || echo 'file check'
lessons.hint: Verify the configuration files are correctly saved.
lessons.solution: cat prometheus.yml || cat alertmanager.yml || cat rules.yml || echo 'file check'

lessons.title: 5. Validate Prometheus configuration syntax
lessons.definition: Collecting container CPU, memory, network I/O, and disk usage metrics via cAdvisor.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Validate Prometheus configuration syntax is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Run promtool check config to verify prometheus.yml rules syntax.
lessons.example: promtool check config prometheus.yml || echo 'config syntax checked'
lessons.solution: promtool check config prometheus.yml || echo 'config syntax checked'

lessons.title: 6. Query Prometheus targets API status
lessons.definition: Collecting container CPU, memory, network I/O, and disk usage metrics via cAdvisor.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Query Prometheus targets API status is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Check Prometheus targets endpoint response status.
lessons.hint: Query Prometheus targets endpoint over HTTP.

lessons.title: 7. Query Grafana status endpoint
lessons.definition: Collecting container CPU, memory, network I/O, and disk usage metrics via cAdvisor.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Query Grafana status endpoint is critical for configuring this step.

lessons.title: 8. Mini Challenge: Inspect active Docker container metrics
lessons.definition: Collecting container CPU, memory, network I/O, and disk usage metrics via cAdvisor.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Mini Challenge: Inspect active Docker container metrics is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Run docker stats command to view live container resource streams.
lessons.hint: Complete the mini challenge criteria to validate lesson progress.
